scope: UTF-8, ASCII, and ISO-8859-1 conversion plus encoding state
Common ASCII and ISO-8859-1 charset aliases
Target-green upstream iconv PHPT smoke rows plus generated bounds coverage
ISO-8859-2 conversion and MIME encoded-word decode behavior
iconv selected //IGNORE and //TRANSLIT conversion option behavior
iconv MIME basic B/Q encode and decode behavior
iconv_mime_decode_headers selected encoded-word and duplicate-header behavior
Promoted upstream iconv_mime_decode and iconv_mime_decode_headers PHPT coverage
Promoted upstream overlong and unsupported charset warning/false behavior
Promoted upstream iconv INI/default encoding rows
non_scope: Full iconv charset catalog and broad transliteration/ignore-mode parity
Remaining MIME header edge cases and full ISO-2022-JP position parity
Stream filters, output-buffer callbacks, XML/DOM dependencies, and exact illegal-input notice parity
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime iconv --no-fail-fast
